prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科（物理类）最低位次约 111→95→109→94→186，2021–2024 年基本稳定在 94–111 名之间，2025 年新高考首年（物理类）大幅后移至约 186 名，较 2024 年后移约 92 名，属异常波动；2025 年基准约 186 名；本省理科计划 2021 年 26 人、2022–2024 年各 25 人、2025 年（物理类）35 人；2026 年物理类计划 52 人，较 2025 年扩招约 48.6%，扩招幅度显著，对竞争有缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜连续多年稳居第 2 名（2021–2026 年均为第 2），全国顶尖水平；2026 年声誉评价偏负面（校园安全、食堂宿舍等舆情），但北大作为全国顶尖学府，声誉波动对报考热度影响有限；抖音热度排名第 3（高热），短视频曝光量极大，报考关注度持续高位；2025 年投档异常信号为高关注（湖北提前批首次空档、元培课程争议等），但整体未动摇北大在河南的录取格局；北京大学拥有 40 个 A- 及以上学科，其中 A+ 学科涵盖数学、物理学、化学、生物学、法学、经济学、中国语言文学、哲学、社会学、计算机科学与技术等，与招生专业高度匹配，学科实力全国顶尖。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、临床医学等北大优势专业大类 2026 年热度持续偏热；法学、经济学等文科类热度分化但北大平台优势突出；本省 2026 年考生总数约 120 万（不确定），按近年物理类占比约 60% 估算约 72 万，较 2025 年物理类 55.5 万明显增加；北京大学位于北京，非本省高校；河南省为生源大省，北大在河南招生计划近年持续增加（2025 年物理类 35 人→2026 年 52 人），体现对河南考生的倾斜。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年新高考首年位次异常后移（186 名）、2026 年大幅扩招约 48.6%、本省物理类考生明显增加、学校顶尖声誉与高热关注度等因素：扩招幅度（48.6%）大于考生增幅（约 30%），竞争略有缓解，但 2025 年位次偏高属首年波动，2026 年应适度回调；预测最低位次约220名，区间170–270名。

一档（最难进）

- 数学类
- 计算机类
- 工商管理类。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:

- 电子信息类
- 物理学类

- 工科试验班类。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 170–270 名内，建议以二档专业为主攻方向、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于 170 名可重点冲刺元培/数学/计算机等王牌专业；位次在 220 名附近建议以电子信息/物理/经济等二档专业为核心；位次接近 270 名建议优先考虑三档专业并关注扩招带来的机会。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2021–2025 Science (Physics Category) minimum rankings approximately 111→95→109→94→186, basically stable between 94–111 from 2021–2024, significantly dropped to about 186 in 2025 (first year of new Gaokao for Physics Category), a drop of about 92 places from 2024, an abnormal fluctuation; 2025 baseline approximately 186; provincial science enrollment plan 26 in 2021, 25 each in 2022–2024, 35 in 2025 (Physics Category); 2026 Physics Category plan 52, an increase of about 48.6% over 2025, significant expansion, easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking consistently ranked 2nd for many years (2021–2026 all 2nd), top national level; 2026 reputation evaluation slightly negative (campus safety, dormitory, cafeteria, etc.), but as a top national university, reputation fluctuations have limited impact on application heat; Douyin popularity ranking 3rd (high heat), short video exposure extremely high, application attention remains high; 2025 abnormal signals of high attention (Hubei early batch first vacancy, Yuanpei curriculum controversy, etc.), but overall did not shake Peking University's admission pattern in Henan; Peking University has 40 A- and above disciplines, including A+ disciplines covering Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Biology, Law, Economics, Chinese Language and Literature, Philosophy, Sociology, Computer Science and Technology, etc., highly matching enrollment majors, top national academic strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Clinical Medicine and other Peking University advantageous major categories remain hot in 2026; Law, Economics and other liberal arts categories have differentiated heat but Peking University platform advantage is prominent; 2026 provincial total examinees approximately 1.2 million (uncertain), estimated about 720,000 based on recent Physics Category proportion of about 60%, significantly increased from 2025 Physics Category 555,000; Peking University located in Beijing, not a provincial university; Henan Province is a major source of students, Peking University's enrollment plan in Henan has been increasing in recent years (2025 Physics Category 35→2026 52), reflecting a tilt towards Henan examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the abnormal ranking drop in the first year of new Gaokao in 2025 (186th), significant enrollment expansion of about 48.6% in 2026, obvious increase in provincial Physics Category examinees, top school reputation and high attention: expansion rate (48.6%) greater than examinee increase rate (about 30%), competition slightly eased, but the 2025 ranking high is a first-year fluctuation, 2026 should moderately correct; predicted minimum ranking about 220, range 170–270.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

- Engineering Experimental Class.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If ranking is within the predicted range of 170–270, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, sprint for Tier 1 majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety; if ranking is significantly better than 170, focus on sprinting for top majors like Yuanpei/Mathematics/Computer Science; if ranking is around 220, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors such as Electronic Information/Physics/Economics; if ranking is close to 270, it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors and pay attention to opportunities brought by expansion.

prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学、汉语言/中文等文科专业 2026 年热度偏热；经济学/金融类分化观望但北大平台优势显著；本省 2026 年考生总数约 120 万（不确定），按近年历史类占比约 38–39% 估算约 45–47 万，较 2025 年历史类 35.2 万明显增加；北京大学位于北京，非本省高校；河南为生源大省，北大文科计划近年稳中有增（2025 年 32 人→2026 年 38 人），对河南考生有利。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次稳定在 46–76 名区间、2026 年扩招约 18.8%、本省历史类考生明显增加、学校顶尖声誉与高热关注度等因素：扩招幅度（18.8%）略低于考生增幅（约 27–33%），竞争略有加剧，但北大文科位次已处于极高位次区间，波动空间有限；预测最低位次约73名，区间23–123名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2021–2025 minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) approximately 52→59→46→76→61, with a fluctuation range of 46–76 over the past 5 years, average about 59, no clear single trend; 2025 (history category) baseline approximately 61; provincial liberal arts plan 2021–2024 each 30, 2025 (history category) 32; 2026 history category plan 38, an increase of about 18.8% over 2025, moderate expansion, somewhat easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; consistently ranked 2nd in the Soft Science main ranking for many years, top national level; 2026 reputation evaluation slightly negative (campus safety, dormitories, etc.), but Peking University's top status is stable, impact limited; Douyin popularity ranking 3rd (high heat), extremely high application attention; 2025 abnormal admission signal is high attention (Hubei early batch vacancies, etc.), but has not changed Peking University's admission pattern in Henan liberal arts; Peking University's liberal arts advantages are prominent, Law A+, Chinese Language and Literature A+, Philosophy A+, Sociology A+, Journalism and Communication A-, Economics A+, Business Administration A+, etc., highly matching with enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law, Chinese Language/Literature and other liberal arts majors are trending hot in 2026; Economics/Finance categories are divided and wait-and-see but Peking University's platform advantage is significant; total number of provincial examinees in 2026 about 1.2 million (uncertain), estimated at about 450,000–470,000 based on recent history category proportion of about 38–39%, a significant increase from 352,000 in 2025 history category; Peking University is located in Beijing, not a provincial university; Henan is a major source province, Peking University's liberal arts plan has been steadily increasing in recent years (32 in 2025→38 in 2026), favorable for Henan examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the stable historical ranking range of 46–76, an enrollment expansion of about 18.8% in 2026, a significant increase in provincial history category examinees, the school's top reputation and high heat attention, etc.: the expansion rate (18.8%) is slightly lower than the examinee growth rate (about 27–33%), competition slightly intensifies, but Peking University's liberal arts ranking is already in an extremely high range with limited fluctuation space; predicted minimum ranking approximately 73, range 23–123.
